diagram_title: Account Manager Unified Refactor — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Platform
systems.description: AI-powered coding assistant with multi-account management

systems.name: Provider APIs
systems.description: External AI provider services (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, etc.)

containers.name: Web App (packages/app)
containers.description: Primary web UI for chat and account management

containers.name: Console (packages/console)
containers.description: Admin console for workspace and provider management

containers.name: CLI/TUI
containers.description: Terminal interface for direct account operations

containers.name: Event Bus (packages/bus)
containers.description: Typed event infrastructure for cross-surface sync

components.name: AccountManager
components.description: Central mutation orchestration service — single entry point for all account mutations (connect, rename, remove, setActive, beginLogin, getQuotaHint). Emits typed events after each mutation.

components.name: Auth (Identity Resolution)
components.description: Token parsing, provider resolution, API key dedup detection, collision resolution. Utility layer — no longer owns mutation orchestration.

components.name: Account (Repository)
components.description: Pure CRUD on accounts.json. Write-ahead pattern (temp → rename → update memory). No business logic.

components.name: Account Routes
components.description: HTTP transport layer — delegates all mutations to AccountManager. Provides mismatch guard (400). No direct Account/Auth calls.

components.name: Provider Capabilities
components.description: Declarative provider config (supportsSubscription, requiresProjectId, autoSwitchOnConnect). Replaces hardcoded if/else branches.

components.name: SSE Account Channel
components.description: Server-Sent Events channel for account event push to web clients.

components.name: Connect Provider Dialog
components.description: Onboarding/connect flow — calls AccountManager.connectAccount() via route.

components.name: Settings Accounts
components.description: Account inventory and global active switch — calls AccountManager.setActiveAccount() via route.

components.name: Model Selection Dialog
components.description: Session-local account/model selection (ephemeral). Metadata actions (rename/remove/connect) are global mutations via AccountManager.

components.name: Console Accounts Page
components.description: Account list and active switch. Uses SSE events for state sync (no full-page reload).

components.name: Console Provider Section
components.description: BYOK credential management — calls AccountManager.connectAccount() via route.

components.name: CLI Accounts Command
components.description: Terminal account management — all mutations via AccountManager (no direct Account/Auth calls).

components.name: TUI Admin Dialog
components.description: TUI control plane — account remove/rename via AccountManager.

components.name: TUI Account Dialog
components.description: TUI account selection — setActive via AccountManager.

components.name: Event Bus Core
components.description: Typed event publish/subscribe infrastructure. Carries account:connected, account:renamed, account:removed, account:active-changed.

components.name: Write-Ahead Storage
components.description: Crash-safe file persistence: clone → write tmp → rename → update memory. Prevents dirty in-memory state on write failure.

components.name: Deploy Verification Gate
components.description: SHA256 hash comparison between build dist and runtime index.html. Runs at dev-refresh end.

components.name: Session Context
components.description: Ephemeral session-local account override. In-memory only, cleared on session end.

relationships.description: Emits typed account events after each mutation
Reads provider capabilities for behavior dispatch
Pushes account events to SSE channel
Metadata actions (rename/remove/connect) via HTTP route → AccountManager
BYOK credential management via HTTP route
TUI subscribes to account events for state sync
